original_text:
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
- Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
- Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
- Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).
- **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
- **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
  - Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
  - Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
- Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

relations.note: Cardinality constraint applies alongside the CTA button styling spec.
Section padding/rhythm operates within the 600px canvas and grid model.

quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60)
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**
Internal section grid: 12-column mental model

rules.intent: Ensure consistent canvas width and responsive collapse for seamless section assembly.
rules.rule_text: Email body is 600px fixed and centered (email.body.width = 600px); sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly. At the mobile breakpoint (breakpoint.mobile = 480px) all multi-column layouts collapse to single column. Internal section grid uses a 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (section.grid.ratio = 50/50), or image/text split (ratio.grid.image_text ≈ 40/60).

quotes: **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
**Section side padding: 24px** left/right
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.**
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Enforce uniform padding and 8px vertical rhythm for zero-gap section stacking.
rules.rule_text: Section side padding is 24px left/right (section.padding.sides = 24px), consistent across ALL sections to make assembly seamless; full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects the 24px insets. Vertical rhythm uses an 8px base unit (spacing.base = 8px) and all padding/margins are multiples of 8. Each section owns its own 32px top AND bottom internal padding (section.padding.vertical = 32px) with no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking. Spacing gaps: heading → body 16px (spacing.heading_body), paragraph → paragraph 16px, body → callout/CTA 24px (spacing.body_callout), image → caption 8px (spacing.image_caption).

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height**
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

**min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas)
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill

rules.intent: Lock the approved, accessibility-compliant CTA button treatment.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use Brand Blue background (cta.button.fill = #00529b), White text (cta.button.label.color = #ffffff), Nunito Sans Bold 16px (cta.button.label.size = 16px), padding 14px 32px, minimum 48px clickable touch-target height (cta.button.min_height = 48px, a brand accessibility rule), and a 24px fully-rounded pill radius (cta.button.radius = 24px). Secondary CTA uses White background, a 2px Brand Blue border (border.cta.secondary = 2px Brand Blue), Brand Blue text, and the same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Prevent competing primary calls-to-action within a single section.
rules.rule_text: One primary CTA per section maximum.
